hypothesis.explanation: Exact match to H*: 'Participants in the contingent feedback condition will adopt an inferior one-dimension categorization strategy more often than participants in the full-information condition.'

study_type.explanation: Matches reference: the study is an experiment with randomized assignment between contingent and full-information conditions.

data_plan.dataset_identifier.explanation: Dataset file names are not specified in the reference document.

data_plan.source_type.explanation: Consistent with the reference stating data will be collected via an online experiment (experimental data).

data_plan.wave_or_subset.explanation: No waves/subsets are discussed in the reference document.

data_plan.sample_size.explanation: Conflicts with the reference. The reference specifies a target analytic sample size of 474 participants, not CSV entry counts.

data_plan.unit_of_analysis.explanation: Matches the reference: analyses are at the participant (subject) level (e.g., comparing participants' 1D scores).

planned_method.models.explanation: Mostly similar. Reference specifies a two-tailed independent samples t-test; the extracted text omits 'two-tailed'.

planned_method.outcome_variable.explanation: Matches the reference outcome: 1D categorization score (proportion aligning with a 1D rule).

planned_method.independent_variables.explanation: Matches the manipulated variable in the reference: feedback condition (contingent vs full-information).

planned_method.control_variables.explanation: Consistent with the reference; no control variables are specified.

planned_method.tools_software.explanation: Software/tools are not specified in the reference document.

planned_method.planned_estimation_and_te.explanation: Consistent with the reference plan to compare mean 1D scores between conditions.
Mostly similar. Reference specifies a two-tailed independent samples t-test; the extracted text omits 'two-tailed'.

planned_method.missing_data_handling.explanation: Matches the reference: any subjects with missing data will be excluded (listwise deletion).

planned_method.multiple_testing_policy.explanation: Consistent with the reference, which focuses on a single primary test and no exploratory analyses.

planned_method.inference_criteria.explanation: Mostly similar. Reference sets alpha = .05, two-tailed, and specifies directional success criteria; extracted text mentions p < 0.05 but omits 'two-tailed' and directional success criterion.
